en_title: Gundam: Rogue Orbit Interview: A Gundam Game with a Focus on How it Feels to be the Pilot
cn_title: 《高达：侠盗轨道》制作人：专注驾驶体验
subtitle: 驾驶高达的真实感
opus_summary: 万代南梦宫在夏日游戏节公布《高达：侠盗轨道》，这是首款从游戏出发的全新高达作品。制作人强调让玩家体验驾驶机动战士的沉浸感，游戏采用真实画面风格，包含人类与未知敌人战斗的人性戏剧。

paragraphs.en: Gundam is no stranger to video games, but the various pieces of the franchise have never started out with one. That’s all about to change with Gundam: Rogue Orbit. Following its reveal at Summer Games Fest, I spoke with main producer Yuya Tomiyama and chief producer Shinya Satake about starting a new era of Gundam as a video game first, what they’re hoping to accomplish with it, and how Rogue Orbit differs from what’s come before. This interview has been edited for clarity and length.
paragraphs.cn: 高达在电子游戏中并不陌生，但系列各分支此前从未以游戏作为起点。而这一切即将随着《高达：侠盗轨道》改变。在夏日游戏节公布后，我与主要制作人富山勇也和首席制作人佐竹晋也进行了交谈，探讨了以游戏为先导开启高达新时代的构想、他们希望借此实现的目标，以及《侠盗轨道》与此前作品的不同之处。为清晰和篇幅考虑，本次采访进行了编辑。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Rogue Orbit is the first time y’all are launching a new Gundam thing through a game. A lot of people know what a Gundam is, but they may not be familiar with Gundam as a franchise or any particular series. What were the things that you knew you needed to have to make Gundam Gundam in Rogue Orbit?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：《侠盗轨道》是你们首次通过游戏推出全新的高达内容。很多人知道高达是什么，但可能不熟悉高达这个系列或任何具体的作品。要让《侠盗轨道》展现出高达的味道，你们认为必须具备哪些要素？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : There are lots of different Gundam universes out there, but Rogue Orbit is the first time we've introduced a new world through a video game. And because of this, we created the worldview with being a video game in mind. We wanted to make sure that the players really felt the experience of what it really felt like to be a Gundam pilot to be [at] the forefront of their experience with this video game.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：高达存在许多不同的世界观，但《侠盗轨道》是我们首次通过电子游戏引入一个全新的世界。正因如此，我们在构建世界观时，脑海中就想着这是一款电子游戏。我们希望确保玩家能真正感受到成为高达驾驶员是怎样的体验，并将这种感受作为这款游戏体验的核心。

paragraphs.en: IGN: I know you probably can’t go into a great amount of detail this early, but what is being a Gundam pilot going to be like for players in Rogue Orbit? I think a lot of people look at Gundam and they’re like “Oh, really cool robot,” but what is it about that experience of being a pilot that you want to communicate to players?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我知道你们现阶段可能无法透露太多细节，但在《侠盗轨道》中，玩家扮演高达驾驶员会是一种怎样的体验？我觉得很多人看到高达，只觉得「哦，好酷的机器人」，但你们想向玩家传达驾驶体验中的哪些部分？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So the information that we've shown so far is really only one part of the game, but we really wanted to focus on the experience of what it really is to become the pilot of the Gundam and we wanted to do that by really, really focusing on the fact that it's an action game. We wanted to make sure that the game's actions felt really good to play and through that we want users, because they feel it, we want users to feel the experience of, truly feel that they're actually controlling each of the Mobile Suit’s actions.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：目前我们展示的内容实际上只是游戏的一部分，但我们真的非常想专注于呈现成为一名高达驾驶员的真实体验，而打算通过重点突出这是一款动作游戏来实现这一点。我们想确保游戏的动作手感极佳，并通过这一点让玩家——因为他们能切实感受到——让他们真正感觉自己能操控机动战士的每一个动作。

paragraphs.en: IGN: I think most people who are familiar with Gundam are used to seeing Gundams battle other Gundams or other Mobile Suits. But in the trailer, we see our Gundam battling monsters. We don't really know the story here. Could you talk about designing a game around those enemies and what we can expect when we’re fighting them?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我想大多数熟悉高达的人都习惯看到高达与其他高达或其它机动战士战斗。但在预告片中，我们却看到高达在与怪物作战。我们还不清楚故事的来龙去脉。能谈谈围绕这些敌人设计游戏的思路，以及我们在与它们战斗时可以期待什么吗？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So for this game, we really wanted to bring Gundam to fans all over the world and this was like a sort of new venture for us as a company. As a company as a whole, we wanted to come together and bring this experience to users. And as for the enemies, you may have seen in the trailer, the Gundam's weapon, the physical store is very large and we wanted to focus on the sort of satisfying feeling of using those kinds of weapons and the enemies were really designed with that in mind. How can we maximize that feeling for the users? And that was sort of what we were thinking about when we created these enemies.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：对于这款游戏，我们真的希望能将高达带给全世界的粉丝，这对我们公司来说也是一次全新的尝试。整个公司团结一致，希望为玩家提供这种体验。至于敌人，你可能在预告片中看到了，高达的武器——实体刃——非常庞大，我们想专注于使用这类武器所带来的那种满足感，敌人的设计正是以此为出发点。我们考虑的是：怎样才能将这种感受最大化带给玩家？这就是我们设计这些敌人时的思考过程。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Obviously people associate Gundam with cool robots, but the franchise usually has a deep emotional core to it, too, and the stories often deal with complex subject matter. This will be a lot of people’s first exposure to Gundam. How are you bringing that legacy of the IP into the game?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：显然，人们会把高达与酷炫的机器人联系在一起，但这个系列通常也有深刻的情感内核，故事往往涉及复杂的主题。对很多人来说，这会成为他们接触高达的入门作品。你们如何将这一IP的遗产带入游戏之中？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So for this trailer we were able to show a lot of the action and the battles, but there's definitely a lot of characters and a lot of characters that we haven't really revealed yet. The human drama between them is definitely going to be a focal point of this video game and we hope that in the upcoming months we can definitely show more of this emotion through our trailers and other things we’ll be revealing.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：在这次的预告片中，我们展示了大量动作和战斗场面，但毫无疑问，游戏中还有许多角色，还有很多我们尚未公开的角色。角色之间的人性戏剧肯定会是这款游戏的一个核心焦点，我们希望在未来几个月内，能通过后续预告片和其他信息，更多地展现出这种情感。

paragraphs.en: Shinya Satake : This game setting mainly revolves around the conflict between humans and these unknown adversaries, which puts the sort of like world as a very, very tense situation and just sort of testing the limits of humanity and Sofia, RE-X, and the other characters that we'll be showing are going to be making a lot of like very difficult decisions in this harsh world. We hope that that will be the emotions of the Gundam universe that we'll bring to this game.
paragraphs.cn: 佐竹晋也：本作的故事背景主要围绕人类与这些未知敌人之间的冲突展开，这使得整个世界处于一种非常紧张的状态，考验着人性的极限。索菲亚、RE-X以及其他即将登场的角色，都将在这个严酷的世界中做出许多极为艰难的决定。我们期望这能为游戏注入高达宇宙的那种情感。

paragraphs.en: IGN: You guys have talked about bringing the IP through the West. For a lot of fans, this is going to be their first experience with it. Did starting a game force you to think about what the core elements of Gundam are? Was there anything that you were like, "Oh, maybe we should reexamine this because we're starting from a different place or we're reaching out to people who maybe haven't played or seen or just experienced Gundam?" Did you have to think about what made the core of Gundam work?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你们提到要将这个IP推向西方。对很多粉丝来说，这会是他们首次接触高达。以一款游戏作为开端，是否迫使你们去思考高达的核心要素是什么？有没有出现类似「哦，也许我们该重新审视一下这一点，因为我们的起点不同，或者我们正试图触达那些可能从未玩过、看过或体验过高的人」的时刻？你们是否必须去思考高达能成功的核心到底是什么？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : We weren't really thinking too much of the Gandham legacy as a whole when we were creating this game. We really wanted to focus on creating a very good action game with the photorealistic graphics that haven’t been in many Gundam games and how to make the Gundam really appealing in this kind of photorealistic environment. Whether it be the design or the action or the battle, we just really wanted to make sure that that was the focal point of what the users felt.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：在创作这款游戏时，我们并没有太多地去考虑整个高达的传承。我们真正专注的是创造一款非常出色的动作游戏，并采用许多高达游戏中未曾出现过的写实画面风格，以及如何让高达在这种写实环境中更具吸引力。无论是设计、动作还是战斗，我们只是想确保这些是玩家体验的核心。

paragraphs.en: IGN: On the subject of photorealism: Gundam is so heavily stylized and I think many people associate it with that kind of look and feel. Were there any challenges with making a Gundam game that looks photorealistic while capturing the feel of that art? How did you approach doing that and making sure that it felt like Gundam?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：关于写实性这个话题：高达的风格化程度非常高，我想很多人会将它与那种特定的视觉效果联系在一起。要制作一款画面写实、同时又能捕捉到那种艺术风格的高达游戏，有什么挑战吗？你们是如何处理这一点的，以确保它依然有高达的感觉？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : This game was developed by Bandai Namco Studios, which has a lot of experience with a lot of Gundam games and robot games in general and we were able to draw on that experience to sort of bring it all together and the Helix to sort of bring that Gundam in this photorealistic world. The Helix design was also created by the artists at Bandai Namco Studios… so they know what makes each design appealing. So they were able to draw upon that to sort of create a Gundam that would really feel appealing, really feel alive in this photorealistic world and that also has to do with the actions because they've been creating these sorts of motions for Mobile Suits for years. So they were able to sort of draw on that action and bring it together all as a whole to bring Gundam to the worldwide fans.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：这款游戏由万代南梦宫工作室开发，他们在众多高达游戏和机器人游戏方面拥有丰富经验，我们能够借鉴这些经验，将其整合在一起，让Helix这台高达融入这个写实世界。Helix的设计也由万代南梦宫工作室的艺术家们完成……所以他们知道什么能让每个设计吸引人。因此，他们能够利用这些经验，创造出一台在这个写实世界中看起来极具魅力、栩栩如生的高达，这一点也与动作表现密切相关，因为他们多年来一直在为机动战士制作这类动作。所以，他们得以将这些动作经验整合进来，一同为全球粉丝呈现高达的魅力。

paragraphs.en: IGN: If you were able to tell people who had never played a Gundam game or gotten into Gundam before and say "This is what Gundam is, " what would you tell them?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：如果你们能对那些从未玩过高达游戏或从未接触过高的人说「这就是高达」的话，你们会说什么？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So to bring Gundam to fans in the form of a video game, it's a very new endeavor for us and it's a very challenging experience, but we really wanted to emphasize that the Gundam is a very unique and special existence as a Mobile Suit in the world and we also wanted to make sure that the human drama between the characters was brought to the forefront.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：以电子游戏的形式将高达带给粉丝，对我们来说是一次全新的尝试，也是极具挑战的经历，但我们真的很想强调，高达作为一台机动战士，在故事世界中是一种非常独特而特别的存在，同时我们也想确保角色之间的人性戏剧得到突出展现。

paragraphs.en: Shinya Satake : Gundam is a franchise and IP that has been very loved throughout history, but one of the things that really makes it unique is that there are many different themes in each of the different iterations of Gundam and each one is very unique and to bring this to a new world through Gundam is just another one of the ways that we're just sort of bringing Gundam to fans in a unique way and just bringing new unique themes in Gundam to be fans.
paragraphs.cn: 佐竹晋也：高达是一部历久弥新、深受喜爱的系列IP，但使其真正独一无二的一点是，每一代高达作品中都贯穿着多种多样的主题，每一部都非常独特。而通过《侠盗轨道》在一个全新的世界中呈现高达，只是我们用独特的方式将高达带给粉丝的又一次尝试，也是为粉丝带来高达全新独特主题的一种途径。

paragraphs.en: IGN: You've talked about humans fighting against this unknown enemy and the strength of the human spirit, but what would you say are some of the themes that y'all are trying to capture here? As you said, Gundam has been so broad and so vast and covered so much storytelling, and it's gone in so many different directions. What do you think thematically is what defines Rogue Orbit?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你们谈到了人类对抗未知敌人以及人类精神的力量，那么你们认为本作试图捕捉的主题还有哪些？正如你们所说，高达的世界是如此广阔，涵盖了如此多的故事，衍生出了无数方向。你们认为在主题上，什么定义了《侠盗轨道》？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : The appeal or the theme that we really want to bring is becoming the pilot, really feeling the experience of becoming a Gundam pilot and we'll hopefully be able to better convey this with more new info… but there's a lot of features in the game that really help the player feel as though they're piloting the Gundam. And especially in battle, we really wanted to create the tense feeling of being in a life or death situation in the cockpit, but at the same time, we really wanted users to… feel that they're like controlling every single motion of the Mobile Suit, that they're able to sort of use the Mobile Suit as an extension of themselves and not feel stressed and make sure that they're actually able to really feel that they're in control of the Helix.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：我们真正想呈现的魅力或者说主题，就是成为驾驶员，真正体验到成为一名高达驾驶员的感受。希望随着更多新情报的公开，我们能更好地传达这一点……但游戏中确实有许多特色，能帮助玩家感觉自己真的在驾驶高达。特别是在战斗中，我们想要创造出坐在驾驶舱里、处于生死关头的紧张感，但同时，我们也很想让玩家真切感觉到自己掌控着机动战士的每一个动作，能将它用作自己身体的延伸，不会觉得有压力，确保他们确实感到自己在操控着Helix。

paragraphs.en: Shinya Satake : Another thing about Rogue Orbit is that this universe and this whole [world] was created to be a video game… which really brings sort of a unique view of how users interact with the world.
paragraphs.cn: 佐竹晋也：《侠盗轨道》的另一特点是，这个宇宙和整个世界都是为了游戏而创造的……这为玩家与世界的互动带来了一种独特的视角。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Can I ask a very silly question? Can I ask about Vii? I need to know more about this character, please. Please give me all the information that you can because I just look at it and I'm like, “I want it to be my friend.”
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我可以问一个很傻的问题吗？能谈谈Vii吗？我需要了解这个角色，求你了。请告诉我所有你能透露的信息，因为我光是看着它，就觉得「好想和它做朋友」。

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So as a game, this is a brand new worldview, brand new universe. So this haro is going to be a little different from the haros that you've sort of known and interacted with throughout Gundam's history. One thing we can really say about this character, it's an actual character that will join you on your battles and launch with you in the Gundam… We really wanted this haro to feel like it's your partner that's coming along with you and there's going to be some more drama between the main character and the Hara too as well. So we hope you're looking forward to that.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：本游戏采用一个全新的世界观和全新的宇宙。所以这个哈罗会与你在高达历史中熟知和互动过的哈罗们有所不同。关于这个角色，我们能说的是，它是一个真正的角色，会随你一同出击，与你一同驾驶高达……我们真的希望这个哈罗能让你感到它是你的伙伴，陪你并肩作战，而且主角与哈罗之间也会有一些戏剧性发展。所以希望大家期待这一点。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Let's talk about RE-X. Is he going to be more of a defined character? Is he a little bit more avatar-y? Are we allowed to define who or is he very much his own person that we are just kind of controlling?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我们来谈谈RE-X。他会是一个更明确的角色，还是更偏向于自建化身？我们能否定义他是谁，还是说他是一名完全独立的角色，我们只是操控他而已？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : Rex is definitely a character. He's an independent character that interacts in the world, but we wanted to make sure that players were able to sort of feel as though they'd become him through the gameplay. That the gameplay will sort of allow users to really feel that they are the pilot of the Gundam, that they are Rex and that they're able to control the Mobile Suit.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：Rex毫无疑问是一个角色。他是一个独立角色，在世界上参与互动，但我们想确保玩家能通过游玩，感觉自己仿佛变成了他。玩法会让玩家真正觉得自己就是高达的驾驶员，自己就是Rex，能够操控机动战士。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Well, now I've hit on two out of three, so I have to ask about Sofia. It seems like in the trailer, and you've talked about it, as well, that she's kind of mysterious, and maybe she and RE-X don't know each other initially. Could you talk a little bit about their relationship and give us a little idea of what to expect?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：好吧，现在三人中我已问到两个，所以必须问问索菲亚。预告片中看起来，你们也提到过，她似乎有些神秘，或许她和RE-X起初彼此不认识。能稍微谈谈他们的关系，给我们一点期待的内容吗？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : Unfortunately, we aren't able to offer too many specifics about the plot right now, but the trailer's narration is Sofia and so all of those words are spoken by her. As it's also shown in the trailer, she's watching over what RE-X is doing, so hopefully in the coming trailers and coming information will shed more light on their relationship.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：很遗憾，我们现在还无法提供太多剧情细节，但预告片的旁白就是索菲亚，所有那些话都出自她之口。预告片中也显示出，她在注视着RE-X的所作所为，希望在后续的预告片和信息中，能进一步揭示他们的关系。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Is there anything that the team is very proud of that you feel is core to the game that players may not immediately notice from the trailer or from what you've revealed so far? Is there anything that you feel is core to what Rogue Orbit is that might be maybe a little hidden, or maybe not directly obvious?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：有没有哪些团队特别引以为豪、你认为对游戏至关重要，但玩家可能从预告片或目前披露的信息中无法立刻察觉到的东西？你觉得《侠盗轨道》的核心中，有什么可能是隐藏较深，或者不那么直接显眼的部分吗？

paragraphs.en: Yuya Tomiyama : So one thing that the team is very proud of, especially that you can see in the trailer, is the motions of the Gundam Helix. That was something that the team put a lot of effort into making and they're very satisfied with the end result. And another thing in terms of the video game, the battles’ appeal and how it feels to really be in the inbound and be controlling the Mobile Suit is one of the big features that the team is very proud of and that it's still being brushed up, and it's still being improved every day. So we're hoping the team is really hoping to bring that to fans.
paragraphs.cn: 富山勇也：团队非常引以为豪的一点，尤其是在预告片中能看到的，就是高达Helix的动作表现。这是团队投入了大量精力制作的内容，他们对最终成果非常满意。而就游戏本身而言，战斗的吸引力以及真正驾驶机动战士进行操控的体验，是团队非常自豪的一大特色，目前仍在不断打磨和改进。所以我们希望，团队最终能将这份体验带给粉丝。

paragraphs.en: Will Borger is an IGN freelancer. You can find him on Bluesky @edgarallanbro.
paragraphs.cn: Will Borger是IGN自由撰稿人。可以在Bluesky上找到他 @edgarallanbro。
